title: Ligurian Sevaiiya Crisps
description: A crispy, savory snack made with Ligurian olives and sevaiiya crackers.
instructions: 1. Preheat the oil in a deep frying pan to 350°F (175°C).
2. Crush the sevaiiya crackers into smaller pieces.
3. In a bowl, mix together the crushed crackers, chopped olives, minced garlic, and salt.
4. Using a spoon, drop small portions of the mixture into the hot oil.
5. Fry the sevaiiya crisps until they are golden brown and crispy, about 3-4 minutes.
6. Remove the crisps from the oil with a slotted spoon and drain on paper towels.
7. Serve the Ligurian Sevaiiya Crisps warm, seasoned with salt to taste.
